task_completion.description: Open the eCRM-001 model in OpenVSP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP main window is open and displays the 3D geometry of the eCRM-001 wing-body configuration.

task_completion.description: Launch the VSPAERO aerodynamic analysis tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VSPAERO setup or control GUI window is open within or alongside OpenVSP.

task_completion.description: Configure VSPAERO for an angle-of-attack (Alpha) sweep at a subsonic cruise condition
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VSPAERO setup window shows an Alpha range configured (e.g., Start, End, and Number of Points) and a Mach number set to a subsonic value (M < 1.0).
A VSPAERO solver execution window/terminal is visible showing the analysis running or completed, or the VSPAERO Results Manager shows the newly generated case data.

task_completion.description: View the aerodynamic performance results to find the maximum Lift-to-Drag (L/D) ratio
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VSPAERO Results Manager, a plotted graph, or a data table is visible showing Lift-to-Drag ratio (L/D) values across the different angles of attack.

task_completion.description: Write the summary report documenting the data and the max L/D operating point
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the file '/home/ga/Desktop/vspaero_report.txt'. The text must contain aerodynamic performance data and explicitly state the angle of attack that produces the maximum L/D.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP GUI to set up the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the OpenVSP and VSPAERO graphical interfaces, rather than just executing a pre-written script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The VSPAERO solver was actually executed to generate the data
integrity.visual_evidence: There is visual proof of the solver running (e.g., a solver console window showing iteration logs or a progress bar) rather than the agent hallucinating the aerodynamic data.

integrity.description: The summary report contains genuine extracted data
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file contains specific numerical values for Alpha, Lift, Drag, and L/D that correspond to the VSPAERO results, not just a copy-pasted prompt or placeholder text.
